title: Research & Teaching Labs
tagline: State-of-the-art facilities driving innovation and learning.
overview: NSEC houses over 60 specialized laboratories across all engineering departments, equipped with modern instruments and industry-grade software.
Labs are meticulously designed to comply with AICTE norms while fostering hands-on learning, research, and innovation.
The AICTE-funded IDEA Lab is a cross-disciplinary innovation hub available to all students for rapid prototyping and creative projects.
Each lab maintains strict safety standards and is supervised by trained technical staff and faculty coordinators.

special_labs.name: AICTE IDEA Lab
special_labs.description: A state-of-the-art innovation hub funded by AICTE, equipped with 3D printers, laser cutters, CNC machines, robotics kits, and AR/VR setups for rapid prototyping.

special_labs.name: IdeaLab Innovation Studio
special_labs.description: Cross-disciplinary creative workspace where students from all departments collaborate on live projects, startup ideas, and technical competitions.

special_labs.name: Cyber Security Research Centre
special_labs.description: Dedicated research lab for ethical hacking, network security analysis, and AI-driven cybersecurity experiments with industry partnerships.

special_labs.name: AI & Machine Learning Research Lab
special_labs.description: GPU-powered computing cluster for deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision research projects.

facilities: 1 Gbps high-speed LAN across all labs
Wi-Fi enabled campus with dedicated lab access
Licensed software including MATLAB, AutoCAD, ANSYS, and Oracle
24/7 UPS power backup for uninterrupted operation
CCTV surveillance and access-controlled lab entries
Industry-grade instruments calibrated to national standards
Dedicated technical staff and lab assistants per department
Regular upgrades aligned with industry and AICTE requirements
